issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API token or rate limit responses.
The skill file contains extensive explanatory text and multiple examples that may be considered verbose.
The skill is implemented in Python and relies on httpx, limiting its use to Python environments.

scenarios.name: Fetch unusual TSLA flow with OTM/premium/size filters
scenarios.rationale: Baseline likely fabricates an endpoint such as /api/options/flow and uses apiKey query params, while the treatment hits the documented /api/option-trades/flow-alerts with Authorization Bearer and the correct filter params.

scenarios.name: Spot gamma exposure by strike for RIVN
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents a GEX URL because the path is non-obvious, while the treatment uses the exact documented /api/stock/RIVN/spot-exposures/strike endpoint with bearer auth and references call_gamma_oi/put_gamma_oi.
